word: H6367 - פִּי הַחִירֹת - Pîy ha-Chîyrôth - pee hah-khee-roth' - Pi-hahiroth

sections.paragraph:
פּי החרת - pı̂y hachirôth - pee hah-khee-roth'

From H6310 and the feminine plural of a noun (from the same root as H2356), with the article interposed; mouth of the gorges; Pi-ha-Chiroth, a place in Egypt. (Found in Num 14:19 without the “pi”.): - Pi-hahiroth. [In Num. H14 : H19 without Pi-.]
